title: Phostrogen All Purpose Plant Food, 400g - Plant and Edibles Fertiliser Feed - for Promoting Healthy Growth - Improves Drought Resistance - Plant Nutrition - Indoor and Garden Use
features: PLANT NUTRITION: Provides a convenient all-purpose boost to all indoor and outdoor plants, promoting healthier green foliage, vibrant flowers, and bigger, better fruit
STRONG AND HEALTHY: Phostrogen's formula improves your plants draught resistance and encourages the development of a strong and healthy root system
GROWTH STIMULANT: Ideal for supporting healthy seedlings and established plants growth
SUITABLE FOR: Can be used on edible crops, fruit trees, young plants, seedlings and even houseplants
EASY TO USE: Handy measuring scoop provided for pouring the easily dissolved granules in your watering can
description: From the manufacturer SPECIALLY FORMULATED From encouraging healthy root development to large vibrant blooms, Phostrogen All Purpose Plant Food has been formulated with the British gardener and their gardens in mind. Creating a formula that provides plants with a host of benefits that bring out their very best. A BOUNTIFUL BOOST Making up to 40 watering cans worth of feed, it provides a convenient all-purpose boost to all indoor and outdoor plants, including lawns and seedlings. PACKED WITH ESSENTIAL NUTRIENTS Phostrogen All Purpose Plant Food is packed with essential nutrients Nitrogen, for promoting healthy green foliage; Phosphorous, to improve a plants draught resistance, whilst encouraging the development of a strong and healthy root system; and Potassium, for an abundance of crops & flowers, increased hardiness and resistant to disease.
